title: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
summary: Bitcoin took daily gains to nearly 4% on the second day of "green July" as US labor-market signals supported an easing inflation policy from the Federal Reserve.

title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
summary: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

title: S&P 500 Erases Jobs-Fueled Gain as Chipmakers Sink: Markets Wrap
summary: A selloff in chipmakers drove the S&P 500 lower even as most of its shares rose after a sharp slowdown in US jobs bolstered bets the Federal Reserve won’t raise rates any time soon.

title: Carney to Keep North BC Tanker Ban as Alberta to Unveil Pipeline Proposal
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.

title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
summary: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

title: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
summary: SBI Crypto, the subsidiary of the Japanese financial giant, is the latest firm to shutter its Bitcoin mining endeavor.

title: JPMorgan says Strategy’s bitcoin sale policy introduced ‘avoidable’ risk into crypto markets
summary: Strategy introduced "avoidable two-way risk" into crypto markets with its recent bitcoin sale policy, according to JPMorgan analysts.

title: Irish authorities recover another 500 bitcoins from lost Clifton Collins drug stash
summary: Onchain data from Arkham Intelligence now shows wallets tagged "Clifton Collins" holding roughly 4,500 BTC.

title: US economy undershoots forecasts with 57,000 jobs added in June
summary: Hiring slows after 3-month streak of overperformance

title: Trump’s $1bn plan to remake America’s capital
summary: The US president calls it a ‘gift’ to the nation. Critics say he is racing past checks to stamp his mark on the capital
